description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte dark green and black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle is equipped with a suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, enhancing its stealth capabilities. A red dot sight is mounted on the top rail, providing quick target acquisition. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfort. The magazine and a few loose rounds are visible, suggesting the rifle is ready for reloading. The overall design is compact and modular, suitable for urban operations.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, red dot sight, and detachable box magazine in a matte dark green and black finish.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the slim profile, rail system, and the magazine with loose rounds beside the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the collapsible stock, suppressor, red dot sight, and the magazine partially inserted.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the magazine well, trigger guard, and the underside of the handguard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the suppressor, stock, and the ejection port area.
